user.title: KONTINUUM Setup
user.description: KONTINUUM learns your home's patterns and predicts what happens next. Choose a personality that determines how fast the system learns and acts.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: KONTINUUM includes a brain visualization dashboard. If enabled, it will be auto-installed and accessible via the sidebar.

init.title: KONTINUUM Settings
init.description: Change personality and enable Cortex for LLM-powered multi-agent decisions.

cortex_options.title: Cortex Options
cortex_options.description: Sequential mode queries agents one-by-one instead of in parallel – recommended for single GPU/Ollama setups. Discussion rounds control how many times agents debate before reaching consensus.

agent_1_setup.title: Cortex – Agent 1 (Connection)
agent_1_setup.description: Choose a role and provider. For Ollama just enter the host (e.g. 'localhost' or '192.168.1.100') – http:// and port 11434 are added automatically.

agent_2_setup.title: Cortex – Agent 2 (Connection)
agent_2_setup.description: Configure the second agent. Different agents discuss and find consensus together.

agent_3_setup.title: Cortex – Agent 3 (Connection)
agent_3_setup.description: Configure the third and final agent. KONTINUUM (Prefrontal) acts as leader and makes the final decision.

agent_4_setup.title: Cortex – Agent 4 / Coordinator (Connection)
agent_4_setup.description: The coordinator sees all other agents' proposals and makes the final decision via LLM instead of algorithmic consensus.

error.ollama_unreachable: Cannot reach Ollama at this address. Check if Ollama is running and the URL is correct.
